title: sphaeralcea arequipensis
intro: Sphaeralcea arequipensis, also known as the Mountain Globemallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family that is native to the Andean regions of South America. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been found to have medicinal properties that aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea arequipensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Sphaeralcea arequipensis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is used in traditional herbal preparations to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
